user.title: Set up Home Assistant Email Bridge
user.description: Create a local webhook receiver for fake email notifications. Recipient names map to Home Assistant notify services.

error.invalid_recipients: Recipients must be valid JSON. Each recipient needs notify_service or notify_services.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Email Bridge is already configured.

init.title: Home Assistant Email Bridge options
init.description: Manage fake email recipients and their Home Assistant notify services.

view_addresses.title: Local email addresses

add_recipient.title: Add or update recipient
add_recipient.description: The recipient name is the fake email local part, such as dad in dad@ha-notify.local. The notify service list is populated from active Home Assistant notify services.

edit_recipient.title: Edit recipient
edit_recipient.description: Choose one configured recipient to edit.

edit_selected_recipient.title: Edit {recipient}
edit_selected_recipient.description: Update this recipient's fake email aliases and Home Assistant notification targets.

remove_recipient.title: Remove recipient
remove_recipient.description: Remove a fake email recipient mapping.

send_test.title: Send test notification
send_test.description: Send a fully formed test message through the same dispatch path used by the SMTP bridge.

error.invalid_recipients: Recipients must be valid JSON. Each recipient needs notify_service or notify_services.
error.invalid_notify_services: Fallback services must be comma-separated service names such as notify.mobile_app_dads_iphone,persistent_notification.create.
error.no_notify_service: No configured notify service was available for this recipient.
